wisdom.content: When using adv_change_update, passing empty strings for artifact fields can overwrite/restage artifacts and trigger scaffold projection on later reads. Only include artifact fields that should be written, and pass non-empty restored content when repairing.

proposal.approval_evidence: Proposal gate completed. Confirmed problem statement, captured prior decisions (WSJF=sequencing not quality, /adv-roadmap is command-not-role, strip ROADMAP.md WSJF columns), rejected approaches (prose-only rule, hide WSJF from triage, score-aware quality scaling), and 6 open Discovery Agenda items. B/F/S scan: all Clear, no CRITICAL/HIGH findings. One MEDIUM on rule section naming flexibility — defer to design.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed. Findings persisted in proposal. Agreement persisted with user-approved AC1-AC9, objectives, constraints, avoidances, and contract spine. User decisions: ROADMAP.md rank-only; invariant applies to quality gates except triage/roadmap; sanitize future imports only. No blocking ambiguity findings (B:C F:C S:C M:C).

design.approval_evidence: Design complete. Independent adv-researcher validator returned VALIDATED. Incorporated validator recommendations: ADV_INSTRUCTIONS roadmap wording must change; ROADMAP.md tests must cover run-summary wording; sanitizer contract includes concrete scoring-trailer/table examples. No CONFLICT, no user-value tradeoff unresolved, no contract-compromise risk.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved re-entry prep with reply `approve`. Added spec task tk-7ceee720ba70 to formalize score-blind invariant, ROADMAP.md score-free mirror, and roadmap-origin sanitizer requirements in .adv/specs with tests.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete after planning re-entry: all 6 tasks done with checkpoint commits. Final verification after spec task: focused tests passed (60 tests) and pnpm run check passed.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted implementation with reply `accept`. Acceptance evidence: all 6 tasks done with checkpoint commits; focused tests passed (60 tests); pnpm run check passed; adv_change_validate strict passed with warnings only; review findings none.

release.approval_evidence: Release sign-off by user: `sign off`. Release readiness verified: all prior gates complete, all 6 tasks done, worktree clean, focused tests passed (60 tests), pnpm run check passed, strict validation passed with warnings only, conformance status has no configured specs.

reentry_history.reason: Review found an in-scope gap before acceptance: agreement/avoidances require score-blindness backed by specs and tests, but task graph omitted a concrete .adv/specs requirement update. Re-enter planning to add spec task; preserve completed implementation tasks.
reentry_history.scope_delta: Add one in-scope task to update .adv/specs (likely advance-workflow or advance-meta) with score-blind quality invariant, ROADMAP.md score-free mirror, and roadmap-origin sanitizer requirements plus asset/spec validation as needed.
